response:
MOORE'S LAW WILL LIKELY CEASE TO HOLD TRUE WHEN PHYSICAL LIMITS OF SILICON TRANSISTORS ARE REACHED AROUND THE 2020s OR EARLY 2030s AS QUANTUM EFFECTS AND HEAT DISSIPATION CHALLENGES PREVENT FURTHER DENSITY INCREASES AT THE CURRENT PACE OF INNOVATION
